name: Park Hotels & Resorts Inc.
business: Park Hotels & Resorts Inc. is a lodging real estate investment trust that owns and operates a portfolio of 34 premium-branded hotels and resorts with approximately 23,000 rooms, primarily in the United States. The company generates revenue from room rentals, food and beverage sales, and ancillary hotel services. Its strategic focus is on 21 Core hotels, with over 96% of Core portfolio rooms classified as luxury or upper upscale.
sellsTo: transient guests (individual business and leisure travelers)
group guests (organizations reserving for meetings, conferences, or social functions)

catalysts.event: Completion of second phase of guestroom renovations at Hilton New Orleans Riverside
catalysts.sentence: Completed the first of three phases of guestroom renovations totaling $16 million at the main tower of the Hilton New Orleans Riverside in November 2024 and the second phase of over $30 million of guestroom renovations in January 2026

catalysts.event: Completion of second and final phase of guestroom renovations at Hilton Waikoloa Village
catalysts.sentence: the second and final phase of guestroom renovations and room conversions at the Hilton Waikoloa Village completed in January 2026

catalysts.event: Expected completion of second and final phase of guestroom renovations at Hilton Hawaiian Village Waikiki Beach Resort
catalysts.sentence: the second and final phase at the Hilton Hawaiian Village Waikiki Beach Resort expected to be completed in March 2026

catalysts.event: Expected reopening of Royal Palm South Beach Miami after comprehensive renovation
catalysts.sentence: with an expected reopening in June 2026

catalysts.event: Expected completion of third phase of guestroom renovations at Hilton New Orleans Riverside
catalysts.sentence: with the third phase expected to total approximately $37 million with a completion date in late 2026
